text:
There once was a girl named Fiona who lived next door. She loved flowers. She used pots and seeds in her garden. Fiona planted strawberries but forgot they liked lots of rain.

Fiona got sick, tired, gray. Sunflowers wouldn't do well without rain. She knew.

It rained buckets. Fiona felt better. Now rainbows!

Her friends came. They danced. Sunflowers grew big. Strawberry vines climbed trees.

Fiona lived happily ever after. Flowers made her smart. Now she plants animals. Oh, how she laughs.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
